task: I’m putting together a simple house checklist for the next few weeks, and I want it to be easy to use if I’m in a hurry. Could you help me sketch a plain version I can fill in without much fuss?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, plain house checklist template you can fill in quickly:

## House Checklist

**Week of:** __________________

### Daily
- [ ] Dishes
- [ ] Trash
- [ ] Wipe counters
- [ ] Sweep/vacuum
- [ ] Laundry
- [ ] Tidy main rooms

### This Week
- [ ] Bathroom clean
- [ ] Sheets/towels
- [ ] Floors
- [ ] Dusting
- [ ] Fridge check
- [ ] Mail/paper sort

### Next Few Weeks
- [ ] Deep clean one room
- [ ] Grocery restock
- [ ] Bills/finances
- [ ] Change filters
- [ ] Yard/outdoor check
- [ ] Repairs/maintenance

### Notes
____________________________________________________  
____________________________________________________  
____________________________________________________  

If you want, I can also make this into:
- a **one-page printable version**
- a **weekly checklist with boxes**
- a **very minimal version for phone notes**

user_simulator.text: That’ll do. Plain enough, easy to mark off. I can use this.
